userStories.title: Clean up DORA_2022_2535 weak entry
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE codigo='DORA_2022_2535'"); echo "DORA_2022_2535 rows: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -eq 0 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Load 32024R1774 and 32024R1773 into norma table
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE celex IN ('32024R1774','32024R1773')"); echo "DORA RTS loaded: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 2 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed DORA obligations - agencia_valores
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='agencia_valores' AND norma_codigo='32022R2554'"); echo "agencia_valores DORA: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 3 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed DORA obligations - eaf (microenterprise exemption)
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='eaf' AND norma_codigo='32022R2554'"); echo "eaf DORA: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 2 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Add 32024R1773 obligations - ICT third-party contractual arrangements
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT perfil_codigo) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE articulo_referencia IN ('art. 28','art. 30') AND norma_codigo='32022R2554'"); echo "Profiles with art.28/30: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 6 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Granularize existing DORA obligations - article ranges to specific articles
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE norma_codigo='32022R2554' AND articulo_referencia LIKE 'arts.%'"); echo "DORA article ranges remaining: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -eq 0 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Update mcp_validation_suite - DORA RTS checks
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - Sprint K complete
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep 'passed' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE celex IN ('32024R1774','32024R1773')" | grep -E '^2' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
